name: Snack Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups mini chocolate chips or M&Ms
recipeInstructions:
1. In a very large bowl, combine the first five ingredients.
2. In a saucepan over low heat, cook and stir marshmallows and butter until melted.
3. Add honey and mix well.
4. Pour the mixture over the cereal mixture; mix well.
5. Add chips, M&Ms, or raisins if desired.
6. Pat two-thirds of the mixture into a greased 15x10x1 inch pan.
7. Place the remaining mixture in a separate 9-inch square pan.
8. Cool completely.
Yield: 4-5 dozen bars
